MATCH (s:Station {name: 'Central Station'}) RETURN s;
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station {name: 'Central Station'}) RETURN t.id, t.name;
MATCH (p:Platform {id: 5}) SET p.status = 'Closed for Maintenance' RETURN p;
MATCH (t:Ticket) WHERE t.expiryDate < date() DELETE t;
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard) RETURN p.name, tc.cardNumber;
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) RETURN i.id, i.description, r.name;
MATCH (tr:Train)-[:HAS_MAINTENANCE]->(m:MaintenanceLog) WHERE m.status = 'Pending' RETURN tr.id, m.issue;
MATCH (d:Depot)<-[:LOCATED_AT]-(tr:Train) RETURN d.name, count(tr) AS trainCount;
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WHERE t.purchaseDate = date() RETURN p.name, t.id;
MATCH (i:Incident {id: 101}) SET i.status = 'Resolved' RETURN i;
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) RETURN r.name, avg(j.delayMinutes) AS averageDelay ORDER BY averageDelay DESC;
MATCH (l:DailyPassengerLog)-[:RECORDED_AT]->(s:Station) RETURN s.name, sum(l.passengerCount) AS totalPassengers ORDER BY totalPassengers DESC LIMIT 5;
MATCH (tss:TicketSalesSummary)-[:FOR_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WHERE tss.date >= date() - duration('P7D') RETURN r.name, sum(tss.ticketsSold) AS weeklySales ORDER BY weeklySales DESC;
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:TRAVELED_ON]->(j:Journey) RETURN p.name, count(j) AS journeyCount ORDER BY journeyCount DESC LIMIT 10;
MATCH (r:Route) WHERE NOT (r)<-[:AFFECTED]-(:Incident) RETURN r.name;
MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog)-[:HANDLED_BY]->(s:StaffMember) WHERE m.date >= date() - duration('P30D') RETURN m.id, m.issue, s.name;
MATCH (tr:Train)-[:OPERATES]->(j:Journey) RETURN tr.id, count(j) AS journeyCount ORDER BY journeyCount DESC;
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j:Journey)<-[:TRAVELED_ON]-(p:Passenger) RETURN i.id, r.name, count(DISTINCT p) AS affectedPassengers ORDER BY affectedPassengers DESC;

MATCH (s:Station)<-[:RECORDED_AT]-(l:DailyPassengerLog) WITH s, sum(l.passengerCount) AS totalPassengers OPTIONAL MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:OWNS]->(:TravelCard)-[:USED_AT]->(s) RETURN s.name, totalPassengers, count(DISTINCT p) AS travelCardUsers ORDER BY totalPassengers DESC;

MATCH (tr:Train)-[:OPERATES]->(j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) OPTIONAL MATCH (r)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) OPTIONAL MATCH (tr)-[:HAS_MAINTENANCE]->(m:MaintenanceLog) WITH tr, r, count(DISTINCT j) AS journeys, count(DISTINCT i) AS incidents, count(DISTINCT m) AS maintenanceLogs MATCH (r)<-[:FOR_ROUTE]-(tss:TicketSalesSummary) WITH tr, r, journeys, incidents, maintenanceLogs, sum(tss.ticketsSold) AS totalSales RETURN tr.id, r.name, journeys, incidents, maintenanceLogs, totalSales ORDER BY incidents DESC, maintenanceLogs DESC, totalSales DESC;
MATCH (s:Station) RETURN s.id, s.name LIMIT 10;
MATCH (tr:Train) WHERE tr.status = 'Active' RETURN tr.id, tr.name;
MATCH (p:Passenger {id: 2001})-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) RETURN t.id, t.price;
MATCH (tc:TravelCard {cardNumber: 'TC10045'}) SET tc.balance = tc.balance - 20 RETURN tc;
MATCH (st:StaffMember) WHERE st.role = 'Driver' RETURN st.name, st.employeeId;
MATCH (d:Depot)-[:STORES]->(tr:Train) RETURN d.name, tr.id;
MATCH (r:Route)-[:HAS_PLATFORM]->(p:Platform) RETURN r.name, p.id;
MATCH (j:Journey) WHERE j.date = date() RETURN j.id, j.status;
MATCH (i:Incident) WHERE i.severity = 'High' RETURN i.id, i.description;
MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog) WHERE m.status = 'Completed' RETURN m.id, m.date;
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:TRAVELED_ON]->(j:Journey) WITH p, count(j) AS trips WHERE trips > 5 RETURN p.name, trips;
MATCH (tr:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WITH s, count(tr) AS trains RETURN s.name, trains ORDER BY trains DESC;
MATCH (r:Route)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j:Journey) WITH r, avg(j.durationMinutes) AS avgDuration RETURN r.name, avgDuration ORDER BY avgDuration DESC;
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WHERE t.price > 50 RETURN p.name, sum(t.price) AS totalSpent ORDER BY totalSpent DESC;
MATCH (tc:TravelCard)<-[:OWNS]-(p:Passenger) WHERE tc.expiryDate < date() RETURN p.name, tc.cardNumber;
MATCH (tr:Train)-[:HAS_MAINTENANCE]->(m:MaintenanceLog) WITH tr, count(m) AS maintenanceCount WHERE maintenanceCount > 3 RETURN tr.id, maintenanceCount;
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:RECORDED_AT]-(l:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE l.date = date() WITH s, sum(l.passengerCount) AS total RETURN s.name, total ORDER BY total DESC;
MATCH (tss:TicketSalesSummary)-[:FOR_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WITH r, sum(tss.revenue) AS totalRevenue RETURN r.name, totalRevenue ORDER BY totalRevenue DESC;
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) WHERE i.status = 'Open' RETURN r.name, count(i) AS openIncidents;
MATCH (st:StaffMember)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(tr:Train) RETURN st.name, tr.id;
MATCH (tr:Train)-[:OPERATES]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.delayMinutes > 10 RETURN tr.id, count(j) AS delayedJourneys;
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard)-[:USED_FOR]->(j:Journey) RETURN p.name, count(j) AS journeysWithCard ORDER BY journeysWithCard DESC;
MATCH (d:Depot)-[:STORES]->(tr:Train)-[:OPERATES]->(j:Journey) RETURN d.name, count(j) AS journeysHandled;
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(tr:Train)<-[:OPERATES]-(j:Journey) RETURN s.name, count(j) AS journeyCount ORDER BY journeyCount DESC;
MATCH (r:Route)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) WITH r, count(i) AS incidentCount WHERE incidentCount > 2 RETURN r.name, incidentCount;
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey) RETURN j.id, sum(t.price) AS totalRevenue ORDER BY totalRevenue DESC;
MATCH (st:StaffMember)-[:HANDLED]->(i:Incident) RETURN st.name, count(i) AS incidentsHandled ORDER BY incidentsHandled DESC;
MATCH (tr:Train)-[:HAS_MAINTENANCE]->(m:MaintenanceLog)-[:HANDLED_BY]->(st:StaffMember) RETURN tr.id, st.name, count(m) AS logs;

MATCH (s:Station)<-[:RECORDED_AT]-(l:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE l.date >= date() - duration('P14D') WITH s, avg(l.passengerCount) AS avgPassengers RETURN s.name, avgPassengers ORDER BY avgPassengers DESC;
MATCH (r:Route)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j:Journey)<-[:TRAVELED_ON]-(p:Passenger) WITH r, count(DISTINCT p) AS passengers RETURN r.name, passengers ORDER BY passengers DESC;
MATCH (tr:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WHERE s.name STARTS WITH 'North' RETURN tr.id, collect(s.name) AS northStations;
MATCH (tc:TravelCard)<-[:OWNS]-(p:Passenger)-[:TRAVELED_ON]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.date >= date() - duration('P30D') RETURN tc.cardNumber, count(j) AS monthlyTrips;
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route)<-[:FOR_ROUTE]-(tss:TicketSalesSummary) WITH r, count(i) AS incidents, sum(tss.revenue) AS revenue RETURN r.name, incidents, revenue ORDER BY incidents DESC;
MATCH (d:Depot)-[:STORES]->(tr:Train)-[:HAS_MAINTENANCE]->(m:MaintenanceLog) RETURN d.name, avg(m.cost) AS avgMaintenanceCost ORDER BY avgMaintenanceCost DESC;
MATCH (st:StaffMember)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(tr:Train)-[:OPERATES]->(j:Journey) WITH st, count(j) AS journeys WHERE journeys > 10 RETURN st.name, journeys;
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WITH p, r, sum(t.price) AS spending RETURN p.name, r.name, spending ORDER BY spending DESC;
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(tr:Train)<-[:OPERATES]-(j:Journey)<-[:TRAVELED_ON]-(p:Passenger) RETURN s.name, count(DISTINCT p) AS uniquePassengers ORDER BY uniquePassengers DESC;
MATCH (tr:Train)-[:OPERATES]->(j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) WITH tr, count(DISTINCT i) AS incidentCount RETURN tr.id, incidentCount ORDER BY incidentCount DESC;

MATCH (r:Route)<-[:FOR_ROUTE]-(tss:TicketSalesSummary) WITH r, sum(tss.ticketsSold) AS tickets, sum(tss.revenue) AS revenue MATCH (r)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) WITH r, tickets, revenue, count(i) AS incidents RETURN r.name, tickets, revenue, incidents, revenue / (incidents + 1) AS efficiencyScore ORDER BY efficiencyScore DESC;

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:TRAVELED_ON]->(j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) WHERE i.severity = 'High' WITH p, count(DISTINCT r) AS riskyRoutes RETURN p.name, riskyRoutes ORDER BY riskyRoutes DESC;
MATCH (p:Platform)-[:LOCATED_AT]->(s:Station) RETURN p.id, s.name;
MATCH (tr:Train) WHERE tr.capacity > 200 RETURN tr.id, tr.capacity;
MATCH (d:Depot) RETURN d.id, d.name, d.location;
MATCH (j:Journey) WHERE j.status = 'Completed' RETURN j.id, j.durationMinutes;
MATCH (t:Ticket) WHERE t.price < 20 RETURN t.id, t.price;
MATCH (tc:TravelCard) WHERE tc.balance < 10 RETURN tc.cardNumber, tc.balance;
MATCH (st:StaffMember) WHERE st.shift = 'Night' RETURN st.name, st.role;
MATCH (i:Incident) WHERE i.date = date() RETURN i.id, i.type;
MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog) WHERE m.cost > 1000 RETURN m.id, m.cost;
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WITH p, count(t) AS tickets RETURN p.name, tickets ORDER BY tickets DESC LIMIT 5;
MATCH (tr:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WITH tr, count(s) AS stops RETURN tr.id, stops ORDER BY stops DESC;
MATCH (r:Route)-[:HAS_PLATFORM]->(p:Platform) WITH r, count(p) AS platformCount RETURN r.name, platformCount;
MATCH (d:Depot)-[:STORES]->(tr:Train) WITH d, count(tr) AS trainCount RETURN d.name, trainCount ORDER BY trainCount DESC;
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WITH r, sum(j.delayMinutes) AS totalDelay RETURN r.name, totalDelay ORDER BY totalDelay DESC;
MATCH (tss:TicketSalesSummary) WHERE tss.date = date() RETURN sum(tss.revenue) AS totalRevenueToday;
MATCH (l:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE l.date >= date() - duration('P7D') RETURN avg(l.passengerCount) AS weeklyAveragePassengers;
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard) WITH tc, count(p) AS owners RETURN tc.type, owners;
MATCH (st:StaffMember)-[:HANDLED]->(m:MaintenanceLog) RETURN st.name, count(m) AS logsHandled ORDER BY logsHandled DESC;
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) WITH i.severity AS severity, count(*) AS count RETURN severity, count;
MATCH (tr:Train)-[:OPERATES]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.date >= date() - duration('P1M') RETURN tr.id, count(j) AS monthlyJourneys;
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:TRAVELED_ON]->(j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) RETURN p.name, collect(DISTINCT r.name) AS routesUsed;
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:RECORDED_AT]-(l:DailyPassengerLog) WITH s, max(l.passengerCount) AS peak RETURN s.name, peak ORDER BY peak DESC;
MATCH (r:Route)<-[:FOR_ROUTE]-(tss:TicketSalesSummary) WITH r, avg(tss.ticketsSold) AS avgTickets RETURN r.name, avgTickets ORDER BY avgTickets DESC;
MATCH (tr:Train)-[:HAS_MAINTENANCE]->(m:MaintenanceLog) WHERE m.status = 'Overdue' RETURN tr.id, m.issue;
MATCH (st:StaffMember)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(tr:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) RETURN st.name, collect(DISTINCT s.name) AS stationsCovered;
MATCH (d:Depot)-[:STORES]->(tr:Train)-[:HAS_MAINTENANCE]->(m:MaintenanceLog) WITH d, sum(m.cost) AS totalCost RETURN d.name, totalCost ORDER BY totalCost DESC;
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.delayMinutes > 15 RETURN p.name, count(j) AS delayedTrips;
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j:Journey) RETURN r.name, avg(j.delayMinutes) AS avgDelayDuringIncidents;
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(tr:Train)<-[:OPERATES]-(j:Journey) WITH s, avg(j.durationMinutes) AS avgDuration RETURN s.name, avgDuration ORDER BY avgDuration DESC;
MATCH (tc:TravelCard)<-[:OWNS]-(p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) RETURN tc.cardNumber, sum(t.price) AS totalTicketSpend;
MATCH (tr:Train)-[:OPERATES]->(j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route)<-[:FOR_ROUTE]-(tss:TicketSalesSummary) RETURN tr.id, sum(tss.revenue) AS revenueGenerated;
MATCH (st:StaffMember)-[:HANDLED]->(i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) RETURN st.name, count(DISTINCT r) AS routesHandled;
MATCH (d:Depot)-[:STORES]->(tr:Train)-[:OPERATES]->(j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) RETURN d.name, count(DISTINCT r) AS routesServed;
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:TRAVELED_ON]->(j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) WITH p, count(i) AS incidentExposure RETURN p.name, incidentExposure ORDER BY incidentExposure DESC;

MATCH (s:Station)<-[:RECORDED_AT]-(l:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE l.date >= date() - duration('P30D') WITH s, sum(l.passengerCount) AS monthlyPassengers MATCH (s)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(tr:Train) RETURN s.name, monthlyPassengers, count(tr) AS servicingTrains ORDER BY monthlyPassengers DESC;

MATCH (r:Route)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j:Journey)<-[:TRAVELED_ON]-(p:Passenger) WITH r, count(DISTINCT p) AS passengers MATCH (r)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) RETURN r.name, passengers, count(i) AS incidents ORDER BY passengers DESC;

MATCH (tr:Train)-[:HAS_MAINTENANCE]->(m:MaintenanceLog)-[:HANDLED_BY]->(st:StaffMember) WITH tr, sum(m.cost) AS maintenanceCost, count(st) AS staffInvolved RETURN tr.id, maintenanceCost, staffInvolved ORDER BY maintenanceCost DESC;

MATCH (tss:TicketSalesSummary)-[:FOR_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WHERE tss.date >= date() - duration('P90D') WITH r, sum(tss.revenue) AS revenue MATCH (r)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) WITH r, revenue, count(i) AS incidents MATCH (r)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j:Journey) RETURN r.name, revenue, incidents, count(j) AS journeys ORDER BY revenue DESC;

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard)-[:USED_FOR]->(j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route)<-[:FOR_ROUTE]-(tss:TicketSalesSummary) WITH p, sum(tss.revenue) AS contribution RETURN p.name, contribution ORDER BY contribution DESC;

MATCH (d:Depot)-[:STORES]->(tr:Train)-[:OPERATES]->(j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) WITH d, count(DISTINCT i) AS incidents MATCH (d)-[:STORES]->(tr2:Train)-[:HAS_MAINTENANCE]->(m:MaintenanceLog) RETURN d.name, incidents, sum(m.cost) AS maintenanceCost ORDER BY incidents DESC, maintenanceCost DESC;
